reviews.review_description:
The game seems like it COULD be interesting, but my god the control for the camera are horrid! It's BARELY responsive, making me have to hit left or right 3-4 times before I get 1 incremental" snap. Even then, it's snap-turning only, which is incredibly embarrassing.
You gyys developed an entire working game, take 5 more minutes and add smooth turning and fix the camera control response.
As is, though the game could possibly have nice ideas and moments (though it looks sloppily thrown together and abandoned now), I think I'll have to get s refund and say that I can't recommend the game.

reviews.review_title: Game is not playable while seated
reviews.review_description: Like so many Quest applications that say they can be used while in a sitting position, this one has  no setting for 'Standing/Sitting'. The Enigma machine is nearly impossible to solve while sitting. If you are not going to accommodate those who have difficulty standing with the headset on, don't say it does.
Hi y’all. I am stuck trying to solve the enigma machine. I found and entered the code, but nothing happened. How can I get assistance in order to move forward in the game? ￼
